title: DMARC Report
helpOutput:
Usage: dmarc-report [<options>] <file>

  Parse and analyze DMARC aggregate XML reports.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to DMARC aggregate report XML file
output:
